prompt: In the exact engraved chromolithograph style of the food illustration in the attached reference image: an ornate $5 gold coin token with a large numeral 5 and traditional Chinese cloud motifs around the rim centered on a plain flat harvest gold (#E0AC45) background with NOTHING else — no border, no frame, no text, no lettering, no ticket, no ornament.
